payload.answer: SQL delete command received. Memory cards matching the command were not specified; applying deletion to the memory_cards table without a WHERE clause will remove all records. Confirm if this is intended. If you want to delete all memory cards, this action cannot be undone.

entity_resolution.reason: sql DELETE FROM memory_cards; issued by user with admin intent; no specific memory card identified

details: Action requires explicit confirmation due to destructive nature.

repair_options: If you intended to delete all memory cards: proceed with confirmation.
If you intended to delete specific cards: provide a WHERE clause to identify targets (e.g., WHERE id = ...).
Alternatively, perform a backup before executing destructive operations.
